title: Cellforge
description: A multi-sheet spreadsheet with a from-scratch formula engine — hand-written lexer, Pratt parser, evaluator, and one live dependency graph with topological recalc + cycle detection. NEW v4 — an ANALYSIS engine: SPILL-RANGE references (A1# names a whole dynamic array, =SUM(A1#)), one-formula PIVOTS (GROUPBY / PIVOTBY), eta-reduced function references (pass SUM by name to BYROW/GROUPBY), RECURSIVE lambdas with a depth guard, plus XMATCH, multi-key SORTBY and WRAPROWS/WRAPCOLS. Two new what-if tools — a Pivot Table builder that emits a live spilling pivot, and a Data Table (one/two-variable sensitivity grid). On top of v3's dynamic arrays (#SPILL!, broadcasting), LAMBDA/LET with MAP/REDUCE/SCAN and Goal Seek, plus cross-sheet refs, named ranges, undo/redo, Excel dates, ~195 functions, draggable SVG charts and find & replace. 188 in-app engine self-tests.
